lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior and interior show significant wear and damage. Mechanical and electrical systems require repairs and are not fully functional.

This vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior is free of any scratches or dents, and the interior is in like-new condition with no visible wear. All mechanical systems are fully operational and up to date on maintenance.
The car is in fair condition.

This vehicle is in absolute mint condition and has been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage. The exterior paint is flawless, with a deep showroom shine and no chips, scratches, or imperfections of any kind. Inside, the upholstery remains in pristine, like-new condition, still retaining that new-car scent. Every mechanical component and electronic feature functions exactly as it did the day it left the factory. This is a collector-grade example with exceptionally low mileage, perfect for someone seeking an investment-quality vehicle that requires absolutely no work.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant attention from its next owner. The exterior paint has faded significantly and shows several deep scratches, dents, and signs of surface rust on the lower panels. Inside, the cabin shows heavy wear with torn upholstery, cracked dashboard plastics, and non-functional electronics. Mechanically, the engine runs roughly and there are noticeable fluid leaks that need immediate repair. This car is being sold strictly as-is and is best suited as a project vehicle or for its salvageable parts.

Get ready to enjoy the road in this fantastic vehicle! It's in good condition and has been well cared for, offering a smooth and reliable driving experience. While it shows a bit of character from its time on the road, it remains a sharp-looking and dependable choice that is ready for many more miles of adventure. A wonderful opportunity for anyone seeking a quality ride at a great value!

Presenting an exceptional vehicle maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in showroom-grade condition, exhibiting a flawless exterior finish and a pristine, smoke-free interior. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure peak performance, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from new. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of uncompromising quality and impeccable provenance.

Hey there! You've gotta see this beauty! It's honestly in such amazing shape, it looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I've taken such good care of it, and it drives like a dream. If you're looking for something that's practically perfect, this is the one for you! Feel free to reach out with any questions!
Offered is an investment-grade E46 M3 in museum-quality condition. This example features the legendary S54 inline-six,
Mint condition. Zero mechanical issues. Flawless interior and exterior. All service records available.

Presenting an absolute 'time capsule' example that satisfies even the most discerning collector’s standards. This vehicle has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment, resulting in a finish that remains deep, lustrous, and entirely free of the typical stone chips, swirl marks, or imperfections found on road-driven cars. The exterior is further protected by a multi-layer professional ceramic coating, ensuring a mirror-like shine. Inside, the cabin is indistinguishable from new; the premium leather bolsters show no signs of compression or wear, the dashboard remains supple without a hint of sun exposure, and the original protective films remain on several interior trim pieces. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, having followed a strict maintenance schedule at authorized service centers regardless of the low mileage accumulated. Every electronic feature, switch, and mechanical component operates with factory precision. Included in the sale is a comprehensive binder containing every service record, the original window sticker, two keys, and all factory manuals. I welcome and encourage independent pre-purchase inspections at any local specialist to confirm this vehicle's extraordinary, showroom-level state.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unrivaled caliber. This vehicle remains in impeccable, showroom condition, having been maintained to the most exacting standards of excellence. Every surface and mechanical component reflects a level of care that satisfies the most discerning collector. This is an investment-grade acquisition for those who demand nothing less than mechanical and aesthetic perfection.

Presented in exemplary condition, this vehicle stands as a testament to meticulous stewardship. Every surface, from the flawless paintwork to the hand-finished interior, reflects a standard of care synonymous with a showroom-fresh delivery. Mechanically superior and aesthetically peerless, this offering is tailored for the discerning buyer who demands nothing less than perfection.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my absolute pride and joy, and let me tell you, she is a total showstopper! This car has been pampered since day one—always garaged, meticulously detailed, and it honestly still has that brand-new car smell. It drives like an absolute dream and looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor without a single blemish. If you’re looking for a ride that’s been loved and kept in pristine shape, you’ve found it! Come see it for yourself; you're going to fall in love!

This E46 M3 represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated performance, featuring the high-revving S54 inline-six equipped with individual throttle bodies and a precision-calibrated VANOS system. The chassis integrity is superlative, with a proactively reinforced rear subframe and factory-spec bushings maintaining optimal suspension geometry. Power is managed via a Getrag six-speed manual transmission and a mechanical limited-slip differential, ensuring linear torque delivery
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service records. Clean title.

Presenting a truly exceptional find: a vehicle that looks and drives as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. This car has been meticulously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled garage, resulting in a flawless exterior with a deep, mirror-like finish and zero imperfections. Inside, the cabin remains in showroom condition, featuring supple, unscuffed leather, pristine carpets, and that unmistakable 'new car' aroma. Every electronic component and mechanical system functions perfectly, backed by a comprehensive service history detailing preventative care far beyond factory recommendations. With incredibly low mileage and a history of adult ownership, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class. It comes complete with all original keys, manuals, and a clean title. For the discerning buyer who demands nothing less than perfection, this is the one.

Presenting a vehicle of unparalleled distinction. This meticulously maintained example represents the pinnacle of its class, preserved in showroom condition. Every surface reflects an exacting standard of care, while the mechanical integrity remains beyond reproach. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than absolute perfection, this offering stands as a testament to automotive excellence.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This specimen remains in showroom condition, exhibiting a flawless exterior finish and an interior that retains its original factory luster. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure peak performance, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from new. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a vehicle of unparalleled preservation.

Hey there! You've got to see this absolute beauty. It's in incredible shape—honestly, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've babied this car since day one, and it's been kept perfectly clean inside and out. It drives like an absolute dream and is ready for its next adventure. If you're looking for something that's basically brand new, you've found it! Come say hi and take it for a spin!

This air-cooled masterpiece features a meticulously maintained 3.6L flat-six engine equipped with Varioram induction for optimized torque delivery across the rev range. The G50 Getrag 6-speed manual transmission provides tactile, short-throw shifts, paired with a factory-spec limited-slip differential. The chassis remains exceptionally rigid, supported by a precision-tuned suspension with refreshed bushings and Bilstein dampers. Braking performance
Used car. Mint condition. Flawless body. Pristine interior. Mechanically sound. Service records included.

This vehicle is an absolute masterpiece of preservation, presenting in showroom-fresh condition that will satisfy even the most discerning collector. Every inch of the original paint retains its deep, mirror-like luster, free from any swirl marks, stone chips, or door dings. Inside, the cabin remains a time capsule; the premium leather upholstery is supple and shows zero signs of wear, while the carpets and dash are entirely pristine. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach. It has been fastidiously maintained with a comprehensive service history, performing exactly as it did the day it left the factory. The engine bay is exceptionally clean, and the vehicle has been strictly garage-kept to protect it from the elements. Every electronic feature and safety system operates with factory precision. This is a rare opportunity to own a collector-grade

Hey there! Are you looking for a ride that looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor? This beauty has been my absolute pride and joy, and it shows! It’s in truly flawless condition—honestly, you won’t find a single scratch or speck of dust. It drives like a dream and has been pampered since day one. I'm sad to see it go, but I know the next owner is going to absolutely fall in love with it. Come take a look and see for yourself!

Mint condition. Spotless interior. No exterior damage. Low miles. Well-maintained.

This vehicle is a true collector-grade specimen that presents exactly as it did on the showroom floor. Finished in a flawless deep-gloss exterior with no swirl marks, scratches, or stone chips, it has been meticulously garage-kept in a climate-controlled environment since day one. The interior remains in an untouched state, featuring supple, unscuffed premium leather that still retains its factory-fresh scent. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, backed by a comprehensive folder of every service record performed exclusively at authorized dealerships. Every component, from the high-performance powertrain to the advanced infotainment system, functions with absolute precision. With exceptionally low mileage and a history free of any imperfections, this is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that bridges the gap between used and brand new. The sale includes all original keys, owner’s manuals, and a custom-fitted car cover.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in pristine showroom condition, exhibiting a flawless exterior finish and an interior that retains its original factory integrity. Every mechanical component has been meticulously scrutinized to ensure peak performance, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from new. This is an exemplary acquisition for the discerning buyer who demands uncompromising excellence and investment-grade quality.
